SortedThe appSend
The app · Send

Send to any @handle. Done.

Type a handle, type an amount, slide to send. Lands in their account in under two seconds. Saturday night, Christmas morning, 3am — same speed.

No BSB. No drama.

Australian banking has trained us to expect three days for a transfer to clear, account numbers we have to text our mum, and "scheduled for next business day" if we're paying after 4pm on a Friday.

Sorted skips all of that. Every account has a @handle — short, memorable, and the only thing you need to send money. @hannah, @maya, @jackl. That's the whole address book.

Slide to send. Money lands in their balance in roughly 1.4 seconds. Costs you nothing. Doesn't matter what time, what day, or what bank they use.

1.4 sec
Average tap-to-balance settlement time
$0
Per send. Forever.
24/7
Always on.
100
Max single send.
How can it be that fast? Settlement happens on Solana — sub-second blockchain rails. We use it because it works.
The flow

Three taps. Done.

Tap one

Pick a handle

Type "@" and start spelling. Past contacts pop first. New ones autocomplete.

~2 sec
Tap two

Punch in the amount

Big keypad, big numbers. Add a note if you want — entirely optional.

~3 sec
Tap three

Slide to send

FaceID confirms, slide releases. Their phone pings. Yours updates.

~1.4 sec settlement
Honest answers

Things people ask.

What if I send to the wrong handle?

Slide-to-send shows you the recipient's name and avatar before you commit. You also get a 5-second "undo" pill at the top of the screen after every send — tap it and the transfer reverses. Past 5 seconds, it's like cash: you'll need to ask for it back.

Is there a daily send limit?

$50,000/day to start, $100,000 per single send. Higher limits available on request — drop us a line at hello@sortedaud.app with a sentence about why.

Can I send to someone who doesn't have Sorted yet?

Yes. We'll text them a claim link — they install the app, claim their handle, the funds appear in their balance. They've got 7 days to claim before it auto-refunds.

What about scheduled or recurring sends?

v1 is one-shot only. Scheduled and recurring are coming. If you need to pay rent every fortnight, hit the button on the first of the month and pin the recipient.

Right then.
Let's get it sorted.

Claim your @handle, top up free, and send your first $5 in under 2 minutes.
